description_long: This object is a rectangular book with a bold, deep blue cover and a wide, horizontal light gray band running across its front and back. The book's cover is solid and unadorned, with no visible illustrations or text, giving it a minimalist and modern appearance. The spine and edges are also blue, while the top and bottom edges reveal the light, wood-like texture of the pages inside. The book appears to be of average thickness, suggesting it could be a hardcover edition. Its clean lines and sharp corners make it visually striking and easy to spot in an urban environment. The overall design is simple, functional, and visually cohesive.
description: A rectangular book with a deep blue cover and a wide light gray horizontal band, featuring a minimalist, unadorned design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue cover with a wide light gray horizontal band and no visible text or illustration.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the book's thickness and the light, wood-like texture of the pages, with blue and gray cover edges.
description_view_2: Back view mirrors the front, displaying the same blue and gray color scheme with no additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the full height of the book and the exposed, textured page edges.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is blue with a wide light gray horizontal band, matching the front and back cover. No text or decorative elements are visible.
